description: You are a compositing artist delivering a final shot for web release. Composite the character walk cycle at /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz over the background painting at /home/ga/OpenToonz/backgrounds/night_city.jpg with depth-of-field separation. The character should appear sharp in the foreground while the background is blurred (Blur effect, value >= 8). The background must be visible behind the character for the full duration of the animation. Render the composite at 1280x720 as a PNG sequence to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/night_composite/.
